code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result: List<Int> = []
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end
  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if have_prev and prev == v
          cur = cur
        else
          result = list.push(result, v)
          prev = v
          have_prev = true
        end
      when None
        cur = cur
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in result
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
